question: <bean id=”myService” class=”com.acme.services.MyServiceImpl” />

options.text: This file is generated by Spring and does not change its behaviour.

options.label: C
options.text: It tells spring to create one instance of the class of type com.acme.services.MyServiceImpl .

options.label: D
options.text: It tells spring which classes provide bean definitions inside.
